name: Do Coding Agents Need Executable World Models, Simplification, and Verification to Solve ARC-AGI-3?
summary: arXiv:2607.15439v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Our previous ARC-AGI-3 agent bundled executable world modeling, scheduled simplification, and exact replay verification, leaving unclear which idea a...
description: arXiv:2607.15439v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Our previous ARC-AGI-3 agent bundled executable world modeling, scheduled simplification, and exact replay verification, leaving unclear which idea accounted for its performance. We address this attribution question with four nested Codex-based agents: a textual baseline; a flexible-interface executable world model without replay verification; the...
author: Sergey Rodionov
